title: Browser Extension: Popup Scan & Overlay Controls

actors.name: Extension User
actors.description: Human user interacting with the popup UI

actors.name: service-worker.js
actors.description: Background service worker routing messages, managing per-tab state, updating badge

actors.name: content-script.js
actors.description: Isolated-world bridge injected into the active tab; forwards commands to page-context detector

actors.name: detector (detect.js)
actors.description: Page-context script that detects CSS/DOM anti-patterns and posts results back

use_cases.name: Scan Page
steps: content-script.js: injectAndScan() → injects detector/detect.js script tag into page
detector: posts { source: 'impeccable-ready' } → content-script triggers sendScanCommand()
use_cases.ui_feedback: Button text changes to 'Scanning...' and is disabled; on completion count badge updates

use_cases.name: View Findings Count
use_cases.trigger: Popup opens OR findings-updated broadcast received
steps: popup.js: updateFromState(state) → reduces findings array to total count
use_cases.ui_feedback: Numeric badge showing total anti-patterns; label is singular/plural; 'has-findings' CSS class applied when count > 0

use_cases.name: Toggle Overlays
steps: detector: toggles overlay visibility, posts { source: 'impeccable-overlays-toggled', visible }
use_cases.ui_feedback: Button label toggles between 'Hide overlays' and 'Show overlays'

use_cases.name: Load Popup State on Open
use_cases.trigger: Popup DOM loaded (auto-invoked at bottom of popup.js)
steps: popup.js: loadState() called immediately on script load
service-worker.js: getState(tabId) → returns { findings, overlaysVisible, injected, csInjected }
popup.js: updateFromState(state) → syncs count display and toggle button label
use_cases.ui_feedback: Popup opens showing accurate current findings count and overlay visibility state

include_extend_relationships: UC1 <<include>> Inject Content Script (ensureContentScriptInjected — only injects if csInjected=false)
UC1 <<include>> Load Scan Config (buildScanConfig — reads chrome.storage.sync for disabledRules, lineLengthMode, spotlightBlur)
UC1 <<extend>> UC2 (scan completion triggers findings-updated broadcast → count display refreshes)
UC3 <<extend>> UC4 (overlay toggle broadcasts back to popup, syncing button state)

key_state.tabState_per_tab: { findings[], overlaysVisible: bool, injected: bool, csInjected: bool }
key_state.popup_local: overlaysVisible (bool), DOM: countNumber, countLabel, btnScan, btnToggle

important_notes: Content script is injected ON DEMAND (not statically) — only when user engages via popup or DevTools
Idempotency guard: content-script uses window.__IMPECCABLE_CS_LOADED__ flag to prevent double-injection
CSP fallback: if script tag injection fails, content-script sends 'inject-fallback' → SW uses chrome.scripting.executeScript in MAIN world
Real-time updates: popup listens via chrome.runtime.onMessage for 'findings-updated' and 'overlays-toggled-broadcast'
Badge text on extension icon reflects findings count (service-worker updateBadge, color #d6336c)
